name: Monday prospect list
prompt: Build 10 new wholesale prospects: independent salons, boutique pharmacies, premium haircare retailers. UK-only. Use /skill sales:account-research + /skill cloudflare-crawl. Save to PP CRM (pp-crm-psi.vercel.app/api/contacts) with utm_source=ppaios-reseller.

name: Daily outreach send (10/day)
prompt: Send 10 outreach emails via Gmail Composio from out.purposefulprofits.co (when warm-up complete). Personalised per prospect using sales:draft-outreach. Run guardrail-check (≤50/day). Update PP CRM stage=Reached out.

name: Daily reply triage
prompt: Check Gmail for replies to outreach. Classify: positive (book demo), neutral (nudge in 5 days), negative (mark closed-lost). Update PP CRM. Draft follow-up replies.

name: Day 28 — domain warm-up complete
prompt: One-time on day 28. Confirm out.purposefulprofits.co warmup is at 50/day capacity. Send a no-op email to caner@purposefulprofits.co to verify SPF/DKIM/DMARC. Then enable daily-outreach-send + daily-reply-triage routines.
